scenarios.name: mixed-boot
scenarios.note: Desktop boot preset with granular live-input focus plus resonator, burst, and Euclid scheduler voices.

scenarios.name: granular-live
scenarios.note: Focused granular live-input render. The file is the effect material, not just a trigger source.

scenarios.name: resonator-live
scenarios.note: Focused resonator live-input render. The file excites the resonant body directly.

scenarios.name: burst-overlay
scenarios.note: Burst-focused live-input render with a lighter granular support layer.

scenarios.name: euclid-overlay
scenarios.note: Euclid-focused live-input render with a lighter granular support layer.

scenarios.name: reseed-live
scenarios.note: Live-input render with deterministic periodic reseeds that cycle the focused processor through granular, resonator, burst, and Euclid worlds.
